gigapan.description:
The typo passage is an exhibit in a passageway in the Museumsquartier.  It includes this machine where, for 2 euro, you can buy a beautiful book which extends the exhibit.

These machines appear in several places in the MQ, including the street art alley, allowing for an expansion of context for the exhibits.

The exhibit is by alex trochut

see http://www.typopassage.at
